title: Ray's Pet Teleport Fix
description: A mod/datapack that prevents pets from getting stuck in unloaded chunks.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df66b750c4ad63dd370ef6816177d6cca9896ae7.png) ## Pet Teleport Fix (PTF) A mod or datapack that **prevents** pets from getting **stuck** in **unloaded chunks**.
### Preview: - Pet teleporting to you after you died: ![Pet teleporting to you after you died:](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CherubicBoot/preview/refs/heads/main/death.gif) - An elytra trip: ![An elytra trip](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CherubicBoot/preview/refs/heads/main/elytra-trip.gif) - A fast movement: ![A fast movement](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CherubicBoot/preview/refs/heads/main/fast-movement.gif) **Warning**: For those who previously downloaded the 1.3 version, **please update to 1.4-HOTFIX** immediately, as the previous version has a major performance issue related to the end dimension. ## Coming Soon: - **Portal Teleportation**: Your pet will get teleported to you when you enter a portal. - **Whistle**: You can manually teleport your pet to you by using ``/whistle`` with the mod version, or ``/trigger whistle`` with the datapack version.
